items.title: Save up to $30 while upgrading your home theater with these Govee TV Backlight 3 Lite sets starting from $55
items.summary:
If you’ve been wanting to upgrade your home theater system with reactive smart lighting, Govee’s official Amazon storefront is offering the TV Backlight 3 Lite Kit at $119.99 shipped, which is not available directly from the brand’s website. This kit would fetch $150 at full price, with it having been keeping down at this rate since mid-January. While we’ve seen it go a bit lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid $30 markdown here that lets you upgrade your media viewing experience at the second-best price of 2026 and the third-best overall. If you want to get the same reactive backlighting for your TVs of 40 to 85 inches in size while saving a bit more without the smart light bars in the above package, you can find Govee’s three standard TV Backlight 3 Lite sizes starting from $54.99 shipped right now.

items.title: Ahead of Mario Day 2026, score up to 40% savings on these Nintendo LEGO sets that start from $8
items.summary:
While LEGO has yet to officially announce specifics on its upcoming Mario Day promotions beyond the teasing of a new upcoming Mario Kart set, Amazon is already spinning its tires on an array of LEGO deals with up to 40% discounts. One notable deal is on the LEGO Super Mario World – Mario & Yoshi set at a $103.99 shipped. Normally $130 at full price, which is what you’d be paying getting it direct from LEGO’s website or stores, this set has been holding out at this rate since mid-February, with the previous time we saw it drop this low being in September 2025. While this deal lasts, which is likely until after Mario Day (March 10), you can score $26 off the going rate for the lowest price we have tracked in its history. You’ll find all the discounted sets rounded up below, as well as some of our favorite picks that are sadly not getting any discounts.

Buy for $28 (Reg. $100)

What we love

Many people are gearing up for spring camping trips and other outdoor adventures, and this Camplux portable propane heater would be a nice addition for folks not looking to wait until extremely warm weather arrives closer to summer. The entire setup only weighs 2.23 pounds, sports three different settings, and delivers 10,000 -15,000 BTU for rapid heating from a 1-pound propane cylinder (which is not included here), giving you up to 2.2 hours of usage before needing a new tank.
